subcodes.first_line: O My spiritual friends! In servitude at the Divine Threshold I yearned for partners and fellow-sharers. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی من در عبودیت آستان الهی آرزوی شریک و سهیم مینمودم الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @prayer for the departed, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
